signals.text: in 18 of 90 sampled transactions (20%), required market research documentation was either missing or inadequate to support the contracting officer's price determination
signals.rationale: Audit observation quantifying a documentation deficiency.

signals.text: the office's contract files for sole-source awards over $1 million did not consistently include the justification and approval documentation required by FAR 6.303
signals.rationale: Audit observation about documentation gaps in sole-source contracts.

signals.text: segregation of duties controls were not consistently enforced. In 7 transactions, the same individual served as both the requisitioner and the contracting officer's technical representative, creating a control gap
signals.rationale: Audit finding describing a control gap with quantified incidence.

signals.text: Issue updated guidance to all contracting officers reinforcing the FAR Part 10 market research documentation requirements, with specific examples of acceptable documentation.
Establish a quarterly file review process for all sole-source awards over $1 million to verify J&A completeness before contract award.
Update the office's procurement standard operating procedure to formally prohibit the dual role of requisitioner and COTR on the same transaction.
issuing updated market research guidance by March 31, 2025
signals.rationale: Committed action with date attributed to the Administrator.
signals.speaker: The Administrator

signals.text: initiated procurement of a contract management system upgrade that will support the dual-role control flagging described in Recommendation 3
signals.rationale: Action already in progress, per management response.
signals.speaker: The Administrator
